/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/server_app_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/src/server/server.cpp.o -o server_app  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd -lpthread
